benefits.description: Increased neurotrophic factors, endorphins, enkalphins, neurosteroid production, neuronal and synaptic plasticity, neurogenesis, brain energy metabolism, intracellular protein synthesis, neuroprotection, antioxidant effects, pro-cognitive and antidepressant effects
Resets hedonic tone and reward system from dopaminergic abuse through positive downstream changes on ΔFosB and CREB
BPC-157 appears to block ability to get more than a buzz from alcohol (at least with beer)

protocol_notes: Cerebrolysin and Cortexin described as Russian super-nootropics. Both can be taken indefinitely at low doses but cost-prohibitive. BPC-157 source recommendation: Diagen (patent owner, carries 'Stable' version). User personal anecdote: finds BPC blocks intoxication from alcohol, particularly beer.
